mapper.select: SELECT code, path_pattern FROM iam_permission WHERE status = 1 AND http_method = #{httpMethod} AND path_pattern IS NOT NULL

SELECT r.scope AS role_level, b.binding_scope, b.business_domain_id, p.permission_scope FROM iam_role_binding b JOIN role r ON r.id = b.role_id JOIN iam_role_permission rp ON rp.role_id = r.id JOIN iam_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND b.status = 1 AND p.status = 1 AND p.code IN #{code} AND (b.effective_from IS NULL OR b.effective_from <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3)) AND (b.effective_to IS NULL OR b.effective_to > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3))
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO iam_role_permission (role_id, permission_id) SELECT #{roleId}, p.id FROM iam_permission p WHERE p.code IN #{code}
